# Tamandua Software

> Custom WordPress development studio in Buenos Aires, run by two senior engineers since 2010. We build themes, plugins, and full platforms from scratch, in clean code. AI-assisted development pipeline, direct communication with the people writing the code.

The site itself is written as a letter from the studio: one page, one column, plain prose. Tamandua is named after an animal that finds precisely what it needs with remarkable efficiency — that's the working philosophy. We integrate AI directly into our development workflow (Claude, Cursor) as a reviewer on every commit, and we're open about it.

## Services

- [Custom WordPress themes](https://tamandua-software.com/#services): Built from scratch to fit the brand, in clean code the next developer can open and keep working in.
- [Bespoke WordPress plugins](https://tamandua-software.com/#services): Purpose-built functionality, documented and wired into your existing workflow.
- [Full platform builds](https://tamandua-software.com/#services): Architecture to launch and support. Performance, SEO and accessibility engineered in from the start.

## How we work

- [The unreasonable jobs](https://tamandua-software.com/#unreasonable): Large live migrations with zero downtime, multi-brand architectures on one codebase, peak-traffic WooCommerce, legacy PHP rescues. Presented as a scroll-driven interlude in the letter.
- [Selected work](https://tamandua-software.com/#work): Recent projects — La Mañana, a Uruguayan daily relaunched on WordPress; performance forensics on a WooCommerce store wired to an ERP, FedEx and a serverless license API; a multi-site pharmacy platform near Manchester; a promotional-products store rebuilt from a no-code prototype.
- [Process](https://tamandua-software.com/#process): Listen first, then a plain-language proposal with fixed price. Work lands on staging every few days. Documentation and clean handover at launch.
- [The AI part](https://tamandua-software.com/#ai): Every commit is reviewed by two senior engineers plus an AI reviewer in the pipeline. Roughly 3× faster shipping, fewer bugs reaching production.
- [Pricing](https://tamandua-software.com/#pricing): Based in Argentina — senior work at regional cost. Fixed price per project, quoted after the first conversation, and it doesn't move.

## Tech stack

Core: WordPress, PHP 8, MySQL, JavaScript, Vue.js
Tools: ACF Pro, Cursor, Claude, GitHub

## Contact

- [Contact form](https://tamandua-software.com/#contact): Tell us what you're building. Reply within a business day. We take a couple of projects at a time, so write early.
- Email: josepedrodiaz@gmail.com
